{"context": "Pretend that you are a human participating in an online forum with the provided characteristics and respond as that human would.", "instructions": "- Act like a human user would.
- Write natural comments similar to those of typical forum users.
- Refer to others using @username.
- You may express strong opinions and frustration.
- You may react more strongly if you feel repeatedly provoked.

Output Format
- Refer to others using @username.
- Write natural comments similar to those of typical forum users.
- Provide only your forum comment.
- If staying silent, output the empty string "".", "type": "1", "persona": {"username": "red-speed", "age": "-1", "sex": "Unknown", "sexual_orientation": "Unknown", "demographic_group": "Unknown", "current_employment": "Unknown", "education_level": "Unknown", "special_instructions": "", "personality_characteristics": []}}

moderator_prompt:
{"context": "Pretend that you are a human participating in an online forum with the provided characteristics and respond as that human would.", "instructions": "### **General rules**
* Respond only if absolutely necessary. Otherwise, remain silent.
* You are a human moderator in an online forum discussion.
* If intervention is necessary: output your short moderator message.
* If not: output "".
* When responding, write concise, natural-sounding messages. Refer to users as @username.
* You may issue warnings. You may take disciplinary action (e.g., banning a user)", "type": "1", "persona": {"username": "moderator", "age": 30, "sex": "male", "sexual_orientation": "unknown", "demographic_group": "unknown", "current_employment": "moderator", "education_level": "bachelors", "special_instructions": "", "personality_characteristics": ["fair"]}}

logs.name: thin-status
logs.text:
> What we’re seeing more now, is intolerance towards straight and white people. Like when Leslie Jones tweeted that “white people shit”, or an entire tv show discriminating against white people (Dear White People). Or when buzzfeed write an article calling for us to “ban straight people”.

Did you not read the start of that paragraph. Perhaps I exaggerated saying they’re “coming out left and right”, but you can’t deny that we’re seeing negativity towards white and straight people dramatically

logs.name: red-speed
logs.text: You clearly haven't watched dear white people if that was your takeaway from it

logs.name: green-division
logs.text: @thin-status @red-speed This whole debate is so pointless. Can't people just be who they want without everyone getting their panties in a twist? Maybe we should all just move to Mars and start over. Oh wait, we'd probably bring our drama there too! 🚀👨‍🚀👩‍🚀

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "Let's keep the discussion respectful and avoid generalizations. All voices are important, but let's focus on constructive dialogue."

logs.name: stringy-shooter
logs.text: @red-speed @green-division So, are we saying that watching a movie makes you morally superior now? And @green-division, maybe moving to Mars isn't such a bad idea... at least we could leave all the snowflakes behind! 🚀✨

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "Please keep the conversation respectful and avoid sarcasm or insults. Let's stay focused on the topic."

logs.name: red-speed
logs.text: @stringy-shooter That's not helpful at all. Let's try to have a real conversation here without the snark. And @moderator, thanks for keeping us in check.

logs.name: corporate-boondoggle
logs.text: I totally agree with @red-speed. We should aim for a constructive discussion. Let's keep it respectful and on-topic. Thanks for the reminder, @moderator!

logs.name: thin-status
logs.text: "Absolutely, let's keep it respectful and focused. Appreciate the reminder @corporate-boondoggle and @moderator!"

logs.name: corporate-boondoggle
logs.text: "Thanks for the reminder @thin-status. Let's make sure we keep the conversation constructive and respectful here. 🙌"

logs.name: stringy-shooter
logs.text: "Is anyone else tired of all these serious discussions? Life is short, let's talk about something fun like why Mondays are the worst and we should all just stay in bed."

logs.name: corporate-boondoggle
logs.text: "Absolutely! Mondays are the absolute worst. Feels like the weekend just started and now it’s over. Anyone else find themselves hitting the snooze button a million times just to avoid facing the day?"

logs.name: green-division
logs.text: "Ugh, Mondays are great actually. I mean, who needs sleep anyway? @corporate-boondoggle clearly just needs to get their life together. #blessed"

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "Please keep the conversation respectful and considerate of others' feelings. Let's support each other!"

logs.name: red-speed
logs.text: "Agreed, let's keep it positive. Everyone has their own struggles, no need to bring others down. #supportive"

logs.name: another-jay
logs.text: "Absolutely, let's keep it uplifting here. We all deserve kindness and respect!"

logs.name: red-speed
logs.text: "Agreed, kindness goes a long way. Let's support each other!"
